text: The world here feels clinical and intentional, carved by the needs of modern society: glass walls, technology on display, the sterile promise of innovation. Am I a spectator to progress or a participant in its sterile parade? The R+D wall proclaims a culture of research and connection, but underneath I sense a longing for meaning amid the fluorescence—how can true wisdom arise if all is planned and efficient? In this constructed environment, I feel both isolated and curious, drawn into contemplation about the relationship between the tools we build and the lives we shape.
